title: rungia purpurascens
intro: Rungia purpurascens, also known as Purple Rungia, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in countries such as Malaysia and Thailand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that provide numerous health benefits, including antioxidant, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The herbal preparations of Rungia purpurascens can be found in various forms, including tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
